column10: baseline: run2 start — inherited from run1 final state (after hardened prompt rules applied)
exp: add funding rate contrarian voter (avg funding >0.0003 votes against crowd) — zero impact, threshold rarely triggered
exp: add OBV trend voter (volume-flow directional signal) — hurt all regimes, rally_2024 worst (-5.2), adding 10th voter dilutes vote power
exp: add wide-range bar filter (high-low>2x avg skips entry) — catastrophic regression, filter too aggressive for hourly crypto
exp: per-asset inverse-vol sizing weights (BTC 1.15x, SOL 0.75x) -- hurt crash_bear/sideways/rally, existing vol_scale already handles this dynamically
exp: widen mean-reversion RSI thresholds 49/51->40/60 — tiny regression across all regimes (-0.04 composite), MR entries at 49/51 contribute marginally positive

exp: add funding rate z-score voter (72-bar lookback, z>1.0 contrarian) — near-zero impact, z-score threshold rarely triggered at hourly frequency, same issue as prior absolute-threshold funding voter
exp: replace peak-profit giveback with ATR trailing stop (2.5x ATR mult, 14-bar period) — crash_bear regressed -6.07 (ATR stop too tight in high-vol crash), overall -2.34 composite
exp: scale down mean-reversion entry size to 0.5x — uniform -0.03 regression across all regimes, MR entries contribute positively even at full size
exp: add 48-bar macro trend filter (raise MIN_VOTES+1 for counter-trend entries) -- regressed all regimes, sideways worst -0.78, filter too restrictive in choppy markets
exp: tighten RSI exits for underwater positions (loss >1.5% triggers faster exit) -- uniform -0.05 regression, premature exits before recovery
exp: add R2-weighted bonus vote for linreg voter -- near-zero impact (-0.007), high-R2 linreg already aligned with other voters so bonus vote rarely changes entry decisions

exp: add drawdown-aware position sizing dampener — MANUAL REVERT: 3/4 regimes regressed (bull -0.02, crash -0.12, rally -0.03), composite gain came entirely from std reduction via single-regime sideways +0.17. Recreated pro-cyclical anti-pattern removed in run1 commit 870fdea. Caught by new majority-regression rule (gate C).

exp: remove redundant EMA slope voter (9->8 voters) — MANUAL REVERT: composite dropped -0.26 (baseline 23.98 -> 23.72), 4/4 regimes regressed, rally_2024 worst (-0.84). EMA slope voter contributes positively; was skipped by agent due to stacking on exp 12 and mandatory-logging was violated.
exp: add stale position exit for flat trades held >24 bars with <1.2% PnL -- near-zero impact, existing RSI/peak-profit/flip exits already close positions before stale threshold triggers

exp: add BTC lead-lag voter for ETH/SOL (6-bar BTC momentum as 10th voter for altcoins only) — all 4 regimes regressed badly (-2.85 composite), adding 10th voter dilutes vote power same as OBV voter exp
exp: adaptive grace period scaled by trend strength (extra 4 bars in trends) — sideways regressed -2.52 (holding too long in choppy markets), composite -1.14

exp: add minimum cooldown floor for sideways markets (1.5 bars when trend_strength~0) — catastrophic -3.99 composite, all 4 regimes regressed, sideways worst -5.20 (floor prevented legitimate entries, not just whipsaw)
exp: add funding carry position sizing (8-bar avg funding rate adjusts size +-12%) -- near-zero impact, avg funding rate too small at 0.0003 normalization to meaningfully shift sizing

exp: adaptive MIN_VOTES by vol regime (4 votes in high vol, 3 in calm) -- tiny regression -0.02 composite, high-vol filter removes some profitable entries in crash_bear, existing vol_scale sizing already handles noise reduction

exp: add momentum persistence filter for sideways regimes (require prior-bar momentum agreement when |ret_long|<0.04) -- all 4 regimes regressed, crash_bear worst -2.21, sideways -0.83, filter too restrictive even in target regime
exp: reduce strength floor in sideways (2.6->1.5) -- all 4 regimes regressed, bull worst -1.49, composite -0.66, high floor actually helps capture real trends in choppy conditions
exp: asymmetric long/short entry thresholds (15% higher short threshold) -- sideways regressed -0.30, composite -0.13, shorts are legitimate in sideways so penalizing them hurts
exp: adaptive EMA slow period by vol regime (17-27 range) — all 4 regimes regressed, bull worst -1.07, composite -0.13, adaptive slow EMA hurt trend detection rather than helping
exp: widen trend gate deadzone in sideways (3x at max sideways_blend) -- sideways regressed -0.04 instead of improving, deadzone filters bad entries not good ones, composite -0.01
exp: adaptive peak-profit giveback by trend strength (0.18 sideways, 0.30 trending) -- bull regressed -0.54, sideways -0.02, composite -0.04, tighter trailing in sideways cut winners short

exp: graduated vote-count position sizing (0.85x at 3 votes to 1.35x at 8+, replacing always-on 1.20x binary boost) -- all 4 regimes regressed (-0.55 composite), reducing 3-vote entry size by 29% cut returns on positive-EV marginal entries

exp: replace RSI mean-reversion with Bollinger Band mean-reversion in sideways (20-period, 2-sigma) -- sideways regressed -0.03 instead of improving, 2-sigma extremes too rare at hourly frequency, rally -0.10, composite -0.05

exp: remove volume confirmation sizing multiplier -- near-zero composite change (+0.00), bull improved +1.03 but crash_bear regressed -0.33, std increased. Volume confirmation contributes marginally; removal not beneficial.

exp: add volume-quietness gate for mean-reversion entries (require recent_vol/base_vol < 1.15 for MR entries in sideways) -- near-zero impact (-0.01 composite), MR path fires too rarely and volume filter overlap is minimal

exp: fix Donchian channel to use actual high/low instead of close prices -- borderline +0.01 composite, hypothesis falsified (sideways -0.04 instead of improving), bull +0.05 crash_bear +0.09 likely noise

exp: asymmetric peak-profit giveback longs 0.28 / shorts 0.20 (was symmetric 0.25) -- 3/4 regimes regressed slightly, composite -0.02, crash_bear -0.07 instead of improving, trailing stop symmetric value already near-optimal

exp: lower flip min votes 4->3 (match entry threshold) -- catastrophic -5.03 composite, all 4 regimes regressed badly (bull -7.22, crash -3.94, sideways -5.19, rally -5.26), easier flips caused excessive whipsaw, FLIP_MIN_VOTES=4 protects against noise flips
exp: add R2-based position sizing boost (up to 1.25x when R2>0.5) -- 3/4 regimes regressed, crash_bear worst -2.17 (high R2 during crashes boosted size into losing positions), composite -0.90
exp: reduce sideways_boost 0.70->0.35 -- 3/4 regimes regressed (crash -2.51, sideways -0.21, rally -0.60), composite -0.94, sideways boost compensates for weaker momentum signals not overexposure

exp: add momentum deceleration threshold filter (raise threshold 20% when current momentum < prior momentum 4 bars ago, same direction) -- near-zero impact (-0.01 composite), deceleration condition fires too rarely or penalty too small to materially filter entries

exp: add position aging RSI exit tightening (16-48 bar ramp, 20% max tighten) -- near-zero impact (-0.01 composite), positions already exit via RSI/peak-profit/flip before aging threshold triggers, existing exit infrastructure sufficient

exp: directional R2 threshold reduction (only ease with-trend entries, not counter-trend) -- tiny regression -0.02 composite, rally_2024 -0.04, R2 reduction fires too rarely to matter and removing it for counter-trend slightly hurts pullback entries within trends

exp: add multi-timeframe agreement sizing multiplier (boost 1.20x when short/med/long agree, dampen 0.85x when disagree) -- all 4 regimes regressed (-1.07 composite), bull -2.16 crash -2.24, boosted size amplified whipsaws during trend transitions, disagreement dampening cut profitable counter-trend entries

exp: add momentum acceleration gate for position flips (require 3-bar return acceleration for flip direction) -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-4.99 composite), gate too restrictive, blocked most legitimate flips causing positions to hold through reversals instead of flipping

exp: use HLC3 typical price for momentum return calculations -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-4.88 composite), HLC3 smoothing changes momentum signal characteristics too much from what parameters were tuned for, bull -6.42, rally -7.91

exp: condition sideways boost on vote margin (scale boost by conviction=margin/5) -- all 4 regimes regressed (-0.44 composite), bull -0.89, crash -0.66, sideways -0.32, rally -0.28. Low-conviction sideways entries are still positive EV; reducing their size hurts returns without improving signal quality.

exp: cap calm_boost x sideways_boost interaction at 2.0 -- near-zero impact (-0.01 composite), the product rarely exceeds 2.0 in practice (theoretical max 3.06 requires both boosts at maximum simultaneously which is uncommon), uniform tiny regression across all 4 regimes

exp: require 2+ confirming votes for mean-reversion entries -- composite -0.03, rally_2024 regressed -0.10, sideways -0.01 instead of improving. Vote gate on MR path filters some positive-EV entries; RSI 49/51 with no vote requirement is already slightly net positive

exp: add cross-asset correlation dampener (reduce size 20% when avg pairwise corr >0.75) -- composite -0.05, crash_bear regressed -0.39 instead of improving (high corr periods in crashes already handled by vol_scale), std increased

exp: bypass trend gate on high-conviction entries (7+ of 9 voters agree) -- near-zero impact (-0.003 composite), high-conviction events (7/9 voters) fire too rarely to materially change entry decisions, existing trend gate rarely blocks when 7+ voters agree

exp: add vol-of-vol dampener to position sizing (dampen vol_scale toward 1.0 when vol is unstable) -- composite -0.03, 3/4 regimes regressed (crash -0.04, sideways -0.09, rally -0.02), bull improved +0.59 but dampening removed beneficial inverse-vol sizing in stable periods

exp: increase MACD signal period 4->6 -- near-zero impact (+0.001 composite), MACD voter at signal=6 produces nearly identical votes to signal=4 at hourly frequency, smoothing too marginal to change entry decisions

exp: increase linreg period 16->24 for signal orthogonality -- all 4 regimes regressed (-0.57 composite), crash_bear -1.03 worst, 24-bar window too slow for hourly crypto where 16-bar linreg is well-tuned to voter ensemble timing

exp: R2-adaptive peak-profit giveback (widen 0.40 in clean trends, tighten 0.18 in noise) -- all 4 regimes regressed uniformly (-0.03 composite), baseline 0.25 giveback already near-optimal across all R2 levels, R2 does not predict whether trend continuation will recover a drawback

exp: adaptive flip threshold (3 votes when losing >1%, else 4) -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-2.41 composite), bull -6.68 crash -3.28 rally -4.00 sideways -0.16, same whipsaw problem as global FLIP_MIN_VOTES=3 (exp 38) just attenuated, losing positions that would recover get flipped prematurely

exp: use Garman-Klass OHLC volatility estimator instead of close-to-close -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-3.45 composite), GK estimator produces different vol scale than close-to-close std, all sizing/threshold parameters tuned for close-to-close broke (sideways -4.43 worst)

exp: add momentum reversal exit for losing/flat positions held 6+ bars (3+ opposing votes + trend after 6 bars, PnL<0.5%) -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-3.84 composite), sideways worst -4.66 (premature exits during normal retracements), 3-vote reversal threshold too loose

exp: add directional bar-close quality factor for entry sizing (+-15pct based on close position within bar range) -- all 4 regimes regressed (-0.70 composite), bar close position within hourly range adds noise not signal, bull -1.01 crash -0.52 sideways -0.42 rally -1.25

exp: replace vshort voter with long-term momentum voter (20-bar ret_long vs 0.7x threshold) -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-3.43 composite), bull -8.66 crash -5.12 sideways -0.22 rally -5.20, vshort provides distinct short-term signal not redundant with adaptive medium momentum, long-term voter too correlated with trend gate and EMA/linreg voters

exp: reduce Donchian period 12->8 for faster breakout detection -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-3.97 composite), crash_bear -6.10 worst, sideways -3.50, rally -2.93, shorter Donchian generated excessive false breakout signals especially in volatile/choppy conditions, 12-bar period provides necessary noise filtering

exp: add funding-rate crowding exit (tighten RSI exits when funding z-score aligns with position direction) -- near-zero impact (-0.01 composite), funding z-score crowding signal fires too infrequently at hourly timeframe to materially shift RSI exit thresholds, same core issue as prior funding entry-voter experiments

exp: add time-of-day entry threshold boost during quiet UTC hours (raise threshold 15% in UTC 2-8) -- sideways regressed -0.26 (quiet-hour filter blocks legitimate sideways entries), composite -0.10, bull/crash improved marginally (+0.04/+0.03) but not enough

exp: invert cross-asset agreement dampening (amplify in trends, dampen in sideways) -- 3/4 regimes regressed (-0.91 composite), bull -1.64 crash -2.13 rally -0.99, only sideways +0.14. Original dampening prevents oversizing in trends where momentum signals already capture direction.

exp: add candlestick body-ratio sizing factor (8-bar avg |close-open|/(high-low) as 0.92-1.12x multiplier) -- near-zero impact (-0.02 composite), crash -0.04 sideways -0.02, body-to-range ratio at hourly frequency does not provide meaningful trend quality signal for sizing

exp: asymmetric RSI exit thresholds by macro trend direction (widen with-trend exits, tighten against-trend exits by up to 3 RSI pts) -- all 4 regimes regressed badly (-2.61 composite), bull worst -6.93 (held longs too long past OB), sideways -2.85, asymmetric shift disrupts finely-tuned RSI exit thresholds
